thi9:1.0.204: p_19Th2_274"Mā su te vaḍḍha lokamhi,vanatho āhu kudācanaṁ;Mā puttaka punappunaṁ,ahu dukkhassa bhāgimā.
thi9:1.0.205: p_19Th2_275Sukhañhi vaḍḍha munayo,anejā chinnasaṁsayā;Sītibhūtā damappattā,viharanti anāsavā.
thi9:1.0.207: p_19Th2_277"Visāradāva bhaṇasi,etamatthaṁ janetti me;Maññāmi nūna māmike,vanatho te na vijjati".
thi9:1.0.208: p_19Th2_278"Ye keci vaḍḍha saṅkhārā,hīnā ukkaṭṭhamajjhimā;Aṇūpi aṇumattopi,vanatho me na vijjati.
thi9:1.0.209: p_19Th2_279Sabbe me āsavā khīṇā,appamattassa jhāyato;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,kataṁ buddhassa sāsanaṁ".
thi9:1.0.210: p_19Th2_280"Uḷāraṁ vata me mātā,patodaṁ samavassari;Paramatthasañhitā gāthā,yathāpi anukampikā.
